case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JORGE DE LA CRUZ ET AL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, JORGE DE LA CRUZ, MIRTHA DE LA CRUZ, NICOLLE DE LA CRUZ, VICTOR
